title: FabricLightVanadiumMod
description: The light version of vanadium, with only multiplayer management
body:
Add support for multiplayer management :
- Custom Display Name based on player op level
- Commands for level 1 opped player :
  - ec (open enderchest)
  - craft (open crafting table)
  - hat (put item in your hand as a hat)
- Commands for admin :
  - ecsee <player> (open enderchest of a player)
  - invsee <player> (open inventory of a player)
  - freeze <player> (freeze/unfreeze a player)
  - op <player> <level> (set level of op of a player)
  - pvp (activate/desactivate pvp)
  - dim <dimension> (teleport you in another dimension)
  - broadcast <message> (broadcast a message to all players)
